rationale: The cited paper appears only once in the citing article, in a grouped parenthetical list of prior marketing-science studies when discussing short- versus long-term effects of marketing actions. The citing paper does not describe any specific result, mechanism, measure, or method from Bijmolt et al. (2005), nor does it use that paper to build hypotheses or interpret findings in a distinct way. Functionally, this is a background literature-list citation rather than a meaningful conceptual or methodological dependency.
